sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48041" key="qeio/dmhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θειό-δμητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεό-</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.157</biblScope> </bibl> (<sense id="n48041.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θεοδηλήτου</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
